character.name: Tiny retro fantasy pixel art character sprite, 24px tall. Inspired by classic JRPG and anime chibi style: head takes up 35% of total height, enormous expressive eyes, tiny dot nose, no mouth detail. Body is a small rounded blob, arms are short stubby nubs held slightly forward at the sides — hands empty, no weapon. Legs are two short thick stumps. Pointy elf ears poking out from under a deep pulled-up hood. Hood fully covers the top and back of the head, only the face visible inside the hood shadow. No visible hair. Wearing a hooded cloak, hood is the dominant head shape. Color palette: deep forest green cloak and hood, pale skin, amber eyes. Max 5 colors. Bold 1px black outline. Flat fills, no shading. Transparent background. Side view facing right.
